creator: pfgshield-freebsd@yahoo.com
text:
FWIW,

I forgot to add a minor cleanup: since we are using lapack from the port/package, there is no need for %%BLAS%% in pkg-plist and we can clean a bit the PLIST_SUB hacks.



      Posta, news, sport, oroscopo: tutto in una sola pagina. 
Crea l'home page che piace a te!
www.yahoo.it/latuapagina
